description: maxima watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 21 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a steel strap Logo at the 12-hour mark Butterfly clasp with a white dial and metallic numbers with metallic hands Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
